idea-plugin.name: Alias Source Navigator
idea-plugin.description:
Makes Go to Declaration follow generated TypeScript auto-import aliases to their original source exports.

Designed for Vue and Vite projects using tools such as unplugin-auto-import and unplugin-vue-components. Instead of stopping in auto-imports.d.ts, imports.d.ts, or components.d.ts, navigation continues to the referenced composable, store, or component.

  • Supports named exports and default component exports.
  • Handles relative typeof import(...) declaration aliases.
  • Leaves normal IDE navigation unchanged.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release.
  • Redirects generated auto-import declarations to their original source exports.
